validated_reasoning: Data reduction is mentioned in the context of hyperparameter tuning and clustering methods, but there is no detailed description of the processes involved. Data cleaning and transformation are not reported.

validated_bibliography.direct_quote: Prior to performing LDA, hyperparameter (alpha and beta) tuning was conducted to improve the performance of topic modelling.

validated_bibliography.section: 2.3. Application of machine learning in the place and destination study
validated_bibliography.direct_quote: The recent research conducted by Li et al. (2018) used density-based spatial clustering of photos, dissimilarity index, spatial scan statistic and location-based tag cloud to demonstrate the spatial patterns that locals and tourists could overlap in the urban spaces using photos from Flickr.
